# Startup OS

Startup OS is an autonomous C-suite command engine designed to displace fragmented agency services and fractional executives with a unified network of AI agents running on real-time transaction ledgers.

## Domain
- Website: https://startupos.my.id

## Core Modules
- **CFO Module (Phase 1)**: Real-time cash runway analysis, SaaS valuation models, Plaid integration, and budget scenario planners.
- **CMO Module (Phase 2)**: Autonomous marketing campaign optimization, programmatic display buying, and ad creative generation.
- **CHRO Module (Phase 3)**: Hiring equity planners, workflow regulation compliance checkers, and candidate sourcing.
- **COO Multi-Agent Mesh (Phase 4)**: Verifiable investor ledgers, lean capacity planners, and multi-agent boardroom simulations.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React, TanStack Start, TanStack Router, Tailwind CSS, Lucide Icons.
- Database: SQLite via D1, Drizzle ORM.
- AI: Google Gemini API.
